scripts.build-all: npm run build-db && npm run build-frontend && npm run build-api
scripts.build-db: cd lib/db && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build-frontend: cd artifacts/bank-of-blockchain && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build-api: cd artifacts/api-server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run build --if-present
